title: 叶公好龙
meaning: 比喻自称爱好某事物，其实并不是真爱好

scenes.title: 叶公爱龙
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, a nobleman in purple robe admiring his room full of dragon paintings, dragon carvings, dragon vases, happy face
scenes.narration: 叶公非常喜欢龙，家里到处都是龙的装饰。

scenes.title: 真龙降临
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, a magnificent real dragon with golden scales appearing at the window of the same purple-robed nobleman house, magical clouds
scenes.narration: 有一天，一条真龙听说了，就来拜访他。

scenes.title: 叶公惊恐
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the nobleman in purple robe terrified, hiding under table, the same golden dragon looking confused at window, dramatic contrast
scenes.narration: 叶公吓得躲到桌子底下，原来他并不是真的喜欢龙。
